faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Pelham Gardens and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our technicians are familiar with the area and can typically reach your home within hours of your call to address urgent flea infestations.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$650 flea treatment price include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing covers a thorough inspection, professional-grade treatment of all affected areas including carpets, furniture, and baseboards, treatment of outdoor areas if needed, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. The final cost depends on your home's size and the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against fleas but safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. We'll provide clear instructions on any brief precautions needed during treatment, and your home will be safe for re-entry within a few hours.

faqs.question: How do I prevent fleas from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: We recommend regular pet flea prevention, frequent vacuuming, washing pet bedding weekly, and maintaining your yard. Our technicians will provide personalized prevention tips based on your specific situation in Pelham Gardens and can schedule periodic maintenance treatments if needed.
